nasb.text: They run like mighty men, They climb the wall like soldiers; And they each march in line, Nor do they deviate from their paths.

esv.text: Like warriors they charge; like soldiers they scale the wall. They march each on his way; they do not swerve from their paths.

cnv.text: 他們奔跑像勇士， 又像戰士爬上城牆； 他們各按自己的路前行， 並不偏離路線。

ccb.text: 它们快速奔跑像勇士， 攀登城墙如战士， 有条不紊地前进。
